entry.title: user created a some materials with reference to other material in MM01 ,now want to know source mat?
entry.content:
Hi, experts

 EX: user created a some materials with reference to other material in MM01 ,now want to know source mat?

want to know the source data like from which material ,plant, storage location

entry.title: Re: gigya.socialize.addeventhandlers is not firing onLogin event function
entry.content: can you try gigya.accounts.addEventHandlers({onLogin: handler})?

entry.title: Re: gigya.socialize.addeventhandlers is not firing onLogi...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Please register your events

1. gigya.socialize.addeventhandlers

2. gigya.accounts.addeventhandlers

And check.

 

I you face additional issues we recommend opening a case to our support team.

entry.title: Re: How To Logout From Identity Provider in SAPUI5 Application in SAP Cloud Platform
entry.content: That's no real logout - that's just a redirect. How is the coding for a real logoff.

entry.title: Re: Using UI Theme Designer in SAP Enterprise Portal
entry.content: I am not able to see the video, it is saying "This Video is private". Can you share video with me on kamalkiri@gmail.com.

entry.title: Re: Cloud-Native Lab #2 - Comparing Cloud Foundry and Kyma Manifests
entry.content:
Hello, thank you for the above deployment manifest.

1. The SERVICE_BINDING_ROOT part of it looks fine. 

 

            env:
              - name: SERVICE_BINDING_ROOT
                value: "/bindings"
            volumeMounts:
              - name: testapp-destination-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/testapp-destination-test"
                readOnly: true
              - name: my-xsuaa-test
                mountPath: "/bindings/my-xsuaa-test"
                readOnly: true
      volumes:
        - name: testapp-destination-test
          secret:
            secretName: testapp-destination-test-binding
        - name: my-xsuaa-test
          secret:
            secretName: my-xsuaa-test-binding

 

2. Assuming the below is the destination service instance and binding manifests with the S/4 destination definition pointing to a SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud sandbox from SAP API Business Hub.

 

apiVersion: services.cloud.sap.com/v1
kind: ServiceInstance
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
spec:
  externalName: '{{ .Values.services.dest.name }}-{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
  serviceOfferingName: destination
  servicePlanName: lite 
  parameters:  
    init_data:
      instance:
        existing_destinations_policy: ignore
        existing_certificates_policy: ignore
        destinations:
          - Name: faas-s4hc-api
            Description: S/4HANA Cloud
            URL: https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud
            Type: HTTP
            ProxyType: Internet
            Authentication: NoAuthentication
            URL.headers.APIKey: {{ .Values.services.dest.APIKey }}
            URL.headers.Application-Interface-Key: {{ .Values.services.dest.ApplicationInterfaceKey }}
            HTML5.DynamicDestination: "true"
            
          - Name: faas-nw
            Description: Northwind
            URL: https://services.odata.org/v2/Northwind/Northwind.svc
            Type: HTTP
            ProxyType: Internet
            Authentication: NoAuthentication
            HTML5.DynamicDestination: "true"

apiVersion: services.cloud.sap.com/v1
kind: ServiceBinding
metadata:
  name: {{ .Values.services.dest.bindingName }}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ .Values.services.dest.bindingName }}
spec:
  serviceInstanceName: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
  externalName: {{ .Values.services.dest.name }}
  secretName: {{ .Values.services.dest.bindingSecretName }}
  parameters: {}
  parametersFrom: []

 

Both are instance level destination definitions to help test your java code. 

You should be able to call these two destination using SAP Cloud SDK for java, namely: https://sap.github.io/cloud-sdk/docs/java/overview-cloud-sdk-for-java

3. with the following values:

 

clusterDomain:
gateway:
services:
  app:
    name: testapp-s4cloud-connection
    port: '8080'
  uaa:
    name: my-xsuaa-test
    xsappname: fun
    bindingName: my-xsuaa-test-binding
    bindingSecretName: my-xsuaa-test-binding-secret
  dest:
    name: testapp-destination-test
    bindingName: testapp-destination-test-binding
    bindingSecretName: testapp-destination-test-binding-secret
    ApplicationInterfaceKey: saptest0
    APIKey: <-- your Business Hub API Key goes here

 

 

 

 

Thank you.

PS. For instance, a code snippet in java script to retrieve the sales order from the sanbox using the SAP Cloud SDK for javascript

 

 

        const { retrieveJwt } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/connectivity');
        const { setGlobalLogLevel, createLogger } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/util');
        const { desc } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/odata-v2');
        const { salesOrderService } = require('@sap/cloud-sdk-vdm-sales-order-service');
        const { salesOrderApi, salesOrderItemApi } = salesOrderService();
 
       async function getSalesOrders(req) {
          return salesOrderApi.requestBuilder()
            .getAll()
            .filter(salesOrderApi.schema.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT.greaterThan(2000))
            .top(3)
            .orderBy(desc(salesOrderApi.schema.LAST_CHANGE_DATE_TIME))
            .select(
              salesOrderApi.schema.SALES_ORDER,
              salesOrderApi.schema.LAST_CHANGE_DATE_TIME,
              salesOrderApi.schema.INCOTERMS_LOCATION_1,
              salesOrderApi.schema.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT,              salesOrderApi.schema.TO_ITEM.select(salesOrderItemApi.schema.MATERIAL, salesOrderItemApi.schema.NET_AMOUNT)
            )
            .execute({
              destinationName: 'faas-s4hc-api'
              ,
              jwt: retrieveJwt(req)

            });
        }

entry.title: Re: How to get SOA Manager Logical Port configuration Det...
entry.content:
Hi Kevin, 

If this a  Webservice for Consumer, then the 3rd party should provide the user for authetication,  which you could then store it in a ztable in case of update, and write an logic to automatically fill those field when running.

Hope it helps.

entry.title: Not able to select the element in SAP IRPA
entry.content:
I'm creating role creation automation based on the mentioned link

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-rpa-2-0-challenge-submission-automate-sap-ecc-authorization-roll-out/ba-p/13499447

I've created till sap access, for the role maintenance I'm not able to select the element in SAP IRPA in the capture screen of role creation.

Attaching the picture of the captured and where I need to define element.

If anyone knows solution on this. please help me on this.

entry.title: 401 authorization error while calling the CPI service from POSTMAN and SOAP UI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Up until this past weekend, everything was going well with my SAP Cloud connection login and admin access. However, for the past two days, I've been receiving 401 authorization errors when attempting to contact the CPI services using POSTMAN and SOAP UI.

Kindly help me to understand what am i missing here (password rest also done but still same issue).

Regards,

entry.title: error during install SAP S/4HANA Server 2022
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We're trying to setup an S/4 HANA system and HANA database (new installation) via the SAP Provisioning Manager 2.0. During installation the PM halts the installation at 54% and prompts us the following error

We're trying to install on RHEL 8.6 with the following hardware specs:

RAM:32GB

CPU:8 core

Storage:800GB

  • How can this error be solved?

Thank you very much for your help!

Best regards,Maryam

SAP S/4HANA 

Red Hat Enterprise Linux

entry.title: Invalid token detected at position 149
entry.content:
Hi All,
I'm trying to do a ODATA call with the following query:
$select=MaterialDocumentYear,MaterialDocument,MaterialDocumentItem,Material,Plant,GoodsMovementType,to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationDate,to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationTime,QuantityInBaseUnit,QuantityInEntryUnit&$expand=to_MaterialDocumentHeader&$filter=to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationDate ge datetime'${property.LSRD}' and GoodsMovementType eq '101' and to_MaterialDocumentHeader/CreationTime ge time'${property.LSRT}'

LSDR=2023-01-01T00:00:00

LSRT=1970-01-01T06:00:00

But I'm facing the below error

 
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<code>005056A509B11EE1B9A8FEC11C21178E</code>
<message xml:lang="en">Invalid token detected at position 149</message>
</error>
 
Can anyone please why this Error is encountered and how to resolve it.


Thanks in Advance,
Sudarshan


@Dan_Wroblewski  ,@Sriprasadsbhat, @Sookriti_Mishra , @JulianoRomanato , MortenWittrock

entry.title: Re: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run...
entry.content:
I solved the problem.
This problem occurred because I used "SELECT DISTINCT" and "GROUP BY" together.
The problem was solved when I removed "DISTINCT" and continued with "GROUP BY".

SELECT DISTINCT and GROUP BY do almost the same job, so let's not use them both in the same "select" 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1: TM master data based Sales Order Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi Michael,

 

Thanks a lot for sharing this new innovation which was indeed a long awaited one. 

 I have a question for you. You have mentioned this new functionality uses TM network functionality ( default route, distance duration etc). Definitely this innovation will be very helpful for inland Transporation where we have GIS providers to give the distance duration information. But many a times we struggle a lot with ocean exports   to get the correct information in SAP . Default route can not be used most off the time  as although shipping type is available for further segregation ( for example LCL vs FCL shipments)  but it is not integrated with sales order . Can you please give more insight about  the additional capabilities SAP has on this subject or is planning to bring in near releases ?

 

Thanks In advance.

Deb

entry.title: Re: Recap of SAP Community Stammtisch at Mindset Consulting Bangalore : April 4th

entry.title: Re: Import Email address from Batch input in BKNB1

entry.title: Strategic Workforce Planning in SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to check if someone has explored SAC connection to SuccessFactors Performance & Goal Management module (PMGM). The goal is to use SAC Planning for Strategic Workforce Planning.

Mainly to get the strategic aims, objectives, opportunities, and challenges at the business area and employee level. The line managers will capture the workforce requirements of those strategic aims, objectives, opportunities and challenges in terms of roles / numbers and skills required, and therefore convert the Strategic plan to more of an Operational plan.

I have already read one blog but it did not mention about the PMDM module:  here

Thanks,

P. Acharya

entry.title: Table refresh after bound RAP action execution on multiple items is not working
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a Fiori Elements App using unmanaged RAP scenario on ODataV4. 

The Actions are defined with parameters and result (+invocationGroup = #ChangeSet). When executing it on a single table line item, the reload works perfectly. But, when executing the action on multiple table items (multi selection), the reload is not working and i have to push the Search button to get my new created entries.

In BAS, I enabled the scroll and navigation to entity and tried with side effects, but without success. 

What am I doing wrong or what is to configure on BAS or anything else? Any ideas/examples?

 

Thx and BR Eddy

SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP Development ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Add components to production order using FM bapi_alm_...
entry.content:
Hi,

Greetings,

1. I Understand that you want to change the Component details inthe Production order.

2. I see that you are using the BAPI-  BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN

Kindly note this BAPI is not for Production order change this BAPI used to change maintenance or service orders and their sub-objects. 

Also we dont have any BAPI to change the Components in the order, we need to try other options.

Br,

Dsk

entry.title: Re: HDI Container Data Lost on Build + Deploy
entry.content: have you ever got any solution ? because I am also facing this issue

entry.title: Access Denied: 403 Error in SAP BTP / XSUAA issue
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm building a full-stack application with SAP BTP CAMP. I've configured the data model, services, and HTTP endpoints. Additionally, I've created a role collection within the trial account. However, during testing, I've encountered issues accessing data. Although the GET command for metadata retrieval is functioning properly, I'm facing difficulties accessing data from specific tables. Each attempt results in a "Forbidden" error message. I've attached screenshots of the error for reference. I would greatly appreciate your assistance in resolving this matter and gaining access to the tables.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Fatima Dhool

entry.title: Re: If we added a filter, shouldn't the select query run...
entry.content:
I solved the problem.
This problem occurred because I used "SELECT DISTINCT" and "GROUP BY" together.
The problem was solved when I removed "DISTINCT" and continued with "GROUP BY".

SELECT DISTINCT and GROUP BY do almost the same job, so let's not use them both in the same "select" 🙂

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Customization of Sales Order screen based on material type in cloud (SAP ABAP).
entry.content:
Hii Community,

How do I customize the sales order screen based on the material type given . I have created some custom fields out of which some are related to type "A" and some are related to type "B". I need to make sales order screen such that Custom Fields related to Type "A" should appear when a particular Material Type is selected and similarly for Type "B" . 

Thanks

Shraddha yak

entry.title: Bookmarks do not show in old interface
entry.content:
Spoiler
 

When turning on bookmarks in Learning, bookmarked learning appear only in new ILX. Old interface bookmark card shows NO bookmarks.

entry.title: Re: Migrate SAP Fiori projects from SAP Web IDE to SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
The migration tool doesn't seem to work on Launchpad plug-in projects. After import of the zip file, the migration prompt does not come up.

Any suggestions for plug-in apps from WebIDE?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Restful ABAP Object Page #LINEITEM_REFERENCE
entry.content: I found the issue, metadata extension of line-item fields must have @UI.identification: [{ position: n }]

entry.title: Re: SAP Autism at Work: The Stories That Made Us
entry.content: Thanks for sharing! Great that SAP provides resources and opportunities for neurodiverse workers around the globe based on their skills, education, and work experiences. Interesting to learn about a variety of journeys, which have contributed to great jobs, career opportunities, and life changing impact. Appreciate that many how-to's and best practices are shared on the Pledge site for any organization (or individual) to review.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
Hi @helenekunz , after checking the site, I do not think that it is SF or am i wrong?

The new search layout will not be as similar as the porche one you share. The data stays in a "result card" instead of different columns as it is shown there.

entry.title: Re: AI Core - problem with copying object from AWS to /mnt/models
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I’ve managed to resolve this error.

Of course, after the path adjustment model was copied correctly (thanks for pointing that out).

The problem was probably with dependencies location…

I think the best explanation would be according to this:
https://forums.fast.ai/t/attributeerror-cant-get-attribute-my-func-on-module-main-from-main-py/97320/3

And in one of the comments there was solution:
“pickle is lazy and does not serialize class definitions or function definitions. Instead it saves a reference of how to find the class (the module it lives in and its name)”

and

 “There’s an extension to pickle called dill, that does serialise Python objects and functions etc. (not references)”

 

So external reference to some dependent artifact was not matching.

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content:
My question was:
Have you tried using the “Administrator” user, not a user with administrative privileges?

Second, what type of user do you want to add? If the user is a "named" user and you exceed the number of named users allowed by your license, you cannot add a user of that type.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One-copy item master data latest attachm...
entry.content:
Hi,

That is a difficult requirement that can only be achieved with an addon.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: BODS Job Stored Procedure
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a recurring bods job contains 4 stored procedures. so once the job completed sucessfully, all these 4 procedures should be executed sucessfully and this can be traced in Job Trace Log. But out of 4 Stored procedures, only 2 procedures are showing as excuted state in trace log but remaining 2 other procedures are  not showing from last week only. upon further checked the trace logs of this job with previous job(which executes 4 Stored procedure sucessfully), seems from below steps the job terminated 

Please anyone let me know on this...

Regards,

Siba

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Datasphere Version 2024.8 — Apr 11, 2024
entry.content:
Thanks,

Good news, but honestly, I was waiting for replication flows in delta mode available in Task Chains already as it was previously listed for the 1st quarter. But since this roadmap item not closed yet, hoping this functionality will be released soon.

entry.title: Re: user created a some materials with reference to other...
entry.content:
Hello @nalini1 

To my knowledge such information is stored neither in material master nor in change documents.

If it were, it is usability would be very limited as a user can change all the data copied from a reference material in MM01.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content:
My question was:
Have you tried using the “Administrator” user, not a user with administrative privileges?

Second, what type of user do you want to add? If the user is a "named" user and you exceed the number of named users allowed by your license, you cannot add a user of that type

entry.title: VAKEY operation used in PCR to refers to custom ABAP code
entry.content:
Could you assist me with understanding the custom VAKEY operation details in the SAP payroll PCR that need modification according to our business requirements? It was authored by another consultant, and I find it challenging to grasp how the VAKEY operation is delineated for custom calculations, particularly referencing some ABAP code. Your guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Sajid

entry.title: Re: Access Denied: 403 Error in SAP BTP / XSUAA issue
entry.content:
Hi @fatimadhool,

Are you accessing it from an App Router or are you trying to access it from a REST Client like Postman?

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: CDS VBAK limit records based on VBAP-POSNR
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have VBAK table and VBAP table, after linking both of the tables I want to display only the records of VBAP-POSNR with multiple POSNR like this POSNR(10, 20, 30, 40 ....) how to do this in CDS or is it possible to do it in CDS only?

in SE38 I do it by counting the POSNR of Sales Order then DELETE the ITAB records if VBAP count is 1 only, I don't have idea how to do this in CDS only

entry.title: SAP B1 Production Order - Stock Pick List including Batch Codes and BBE Dates
entry.content:
Hi, a question for the community.

I'd like to generate a report that creates a simple picking list from a production order, and not using the Generate pick List wizard!

The scenario is: currently the user is viewing the production order and looking at each individual component item to find the oldest stock (FIFO) and the stock locations in the warehouse, then writing the list by hand; this is quite timely and prone to error.

I'd like a report that can be run from the production order on a function button, that looks at all component (child) items from the production order and then shows the bin locations, batch codes and expiry date per item; all in one list

Has anyone done anything similar, or know if this is possible? It seems like it should be possible in a report but I'm struggling to bring it all together!

Feedback would be great 🙂

entry.title: Approaches to add payment card in sales order/customer master in S4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

What are the approaches to add credit card in sales order/customer master in S4HANA.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Working Capital Dashboard for SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content: That's great! You are welcome, Enes.

entry.title: Re: Access Denied: 403 Error in SAP BTP / XSUAA issue
entry.content:
Hi @Ivan-Mirisola,

Thanks for your quick response, i am using App Router  and also directly using CDS watch/run which is exposing output using router port 4004.

Thanks 

BR

Fatima Dhool

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content: HI, yes I am using user Administrator. The user I'm trying to create is of type 'named' user. We have free licenses for a few more users. The current issue occurs not only when I try to create a new user or group, but also when I try to edit some of the available one. I can only delete a user or group. In all other cases, the error message comes out.

entry.title: Re: Access Denied: 403 Error in SAP BTP / XSUAA issue
entry.content:
Hi @fatimadhool,

It seems to me that your cds file contains some authentication/authorization constraints.

Unless you have an env file with the xsuaa details, cds watch/run won't be able to authenticate users. so your service has no jwt to validate any authentication/authorization constraints.

Best regards,
Ivan

entry.title: 1H2024 - Hide the Required Learning Section on the New Learning Home Page
entry.content:
As an administrator, you can choose to hide the Required Learning section on the new Learning home page if learners don't have any required training items assigned to them.

Can the setting "Hide the required learning section if no training is assigned" also be set/activated via the Organisation Connector?

entry.title: Error submitting iOS App to AppStore
entry.content:
Hello everybody!

After generating the .ipa without any problems, I tested sending it to the AppStore and it has displayed the following errors and prevents it from being sent.

For shipping, I'm using macOS Sierra and have Xcode installed at version 9.2.

Asset validation failed (90635)
Invalid Mach-O Format. The Mach-O in bundle "RNVApp.app/Frameworks/iOSPhotoEditor.framework" isn’t consistent with the Mach-O in the main bundle. The main bundle Mach-O contains , while the nested bundle Mach-O contains arm64(machine code). Verify that all of the targets for a platform have a consistent value for the ENABLE_BITCODE build setting. (ID: 7cc8623e-2a1b-48d2-9dc7-d0186cd93b2b)

Asset validation failed (90635)
Invalid Mach-O Format. The Mach-O in bundle "RNVApp.app/Frameworks/WebRTC.framework" isn’t consistent with the Mach-O in the main bundle. The main bundle Mach-O contains , while the nested bundle Mach-O contains arm64(machine code). Verify that all of the targets for a platform have a consistent value for the ENABLE_BITCODE build setting. (ID: 77fb1f1b-4e1e-4ebb-8714-3bea53872e72)

Asset validation failed (90717)
Invalid large app icon. The large app icon in the asset catalog in “RNVApp.app” can’t be transparent or contain an alpha channel. For details, visit: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/app-icons. (ID: 74b6dc3e-b9ae-4234-ad9b-78edef761ece)

Asset validation failed (90725)
SDK version issue. This app was built with the iOS SDK. All iOS and iPadOS apps must be built with the iOS 16.1 SDK or later, included in Xcode 14.1 or later, in order to be uploaded to App Store Connect or submitted for distribution. Starting April 29, 2024, all iOS and iPadOS apps must be built with the iOS 17 SDK or later, included in Xcode 15 or later, in order to be uploaded to App Store Connect or submitted for distribution. (ID: 66942616-95aa-4334-b559-c86909ae5e9e)

Asset validation failed (90135)
Invalid bundle. The executable couldn’t be re-signed for upload to App Store Connect. The app may have been built or signed with unsupported or prerelease tools. (ID: 3a64ac99-7f48-4b9a-be78-6d3575b70a7f)

Below is the log generated by Transporter:

2024-04-15 20:10:14.970  INFO: ContentDelivery version 2.14.8 (14038).
2024-04-15 20:10:15.007  INFO: Show Progress: Contatando os Serviços da Apple…
2024-04-15 20:10:15.800  INFO: Show Progress: Fazendo cópia de “app-54733_ios_build-23839.ipa”…
2024-04-15 20:10:16.106  INFO: Show Progress: Preparando para enviar “app-54733_ios_build-23839.ipa”…
2024-04-15 20:10:16.426  INFO: Show Progress: Analisando pacote…
2024-04-15 20:10:28.616  INFO: Show Progress: Enviando análise para o App Store Connect…
2024-04-15 20:10:30.948  INFO: COMPLETED - PART 1
2024-04-15 20:10:30.951  INFO: Show Progress: Aguardando resposta da análise do App Store Connect…
2024-04-15 20:10:43.178 ERROR: Asset validation failed (90635) Invalid Mach-O Format. The Mach-O in bundle "RNVApp.app/Frameworks/WebRTC.framework" isn’t consistent with the Mach-O in the main bundle. The main bundle Mach-O contains , while the nested bundle Mach-O contains arm64(machine code). Verify that all of the targets for a platform have a consistent value for the ENABLE_BITCODE build setting. (ID: 77fb1f1b-4e1e-4ebb-8714-3bea53872e72)
2024-04-15 20:10:43.178 ERROR: Asset validation failed (90635) Invalid Mach-O Format. The Mach-O in bundle "RNVApp.app/Frameworks/iOSPhotoEditor.framework" isn’t consistent with the Mach-O in the main bundle. The main bundle Mach-O contains , while the nested bundle Mach-O contains arm64(machine code). Verify that all of the targets for a platform have a consistent value for the ENABLE_BITCODE build setting. (ID: 7cc8623e-2a1b-48d2-9dc7-d0186cd93b2b)
2024-04-15 20:10:43.178 ERROR: Asset validation failed (90717) Invalid large app icon. The large app icon in the asset catalog in “RNVApp.app” can’t be transparent or contain an alpha channel. For details, visit: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/app-icons. (ID: 74b6dc3e-b9ae-4234-ad9b-78edef761ece)
2024-04-15 20:10:43.179 ERROR: Asset validation failed (90725) SDK version issue. This app was built with the iOS SDK. All iOS and iPadOS apps must be built with the iOS 16.1 SDK or later, included in Xcode 14.1 or later, in order to be uploaded to App Store Connect or submitted for distribution. Starting April 29, 2024, all iOS and iPadOS apps must be built with the iOS 17 SDK or later, included in Xcode 15 or later, in order to be uploaded to App Store Connect or submitted for distribution. (ID: 66942616-95aa-4334-b559-c86909ae5e9e)
2024-04-15 20:10:43.179 ERROR: Asset validation failed (90135) Invalid bundle. The executable couldn’t be re-signed for upload to App Store Connect. The app may have been built or signed with unsupported or prerelease tools. (ID: 3a64ac99-7f48-4b9a-be78-6d3575b70a7f)
2024-04-15 20:10:43.837  INFO: Show Progress: O envio falhou.
Asset validation failed
Invalid Mach-O Format. The Mach-O in bundle "RNVApp.app/Frameworks/WebRTC.framework" isn’t consistent with the Mach-O in the main bundle. The main bundle Mach-O contains , while the nested bundle Mach-O contains arm64(machine code). Verify that all of the targets for a platform have a consistent value for the ENABLE_BITCODE build setting. (ID: 77fb1f1b-4e1e-4ebb-8714-3bea53872e72)
2024-04-15 20:10:43.838  INFO:
=============
UPLOAD FAILED with 5 errors.
=============

Until last week, the Build had the error "Missing text secrets" which made it impossible to generate the .ipa or .apk file.
They corrected it, but perhaps it triggered other problems.

If anyone has any tips or guidance, I would be very grateful!

entry.title: How to use 2 IAS tenants in single GRC-IAG bridge for access provisioning in Nonprod and prod system
entry.content:
Is it possible to use 2 different IAS (Non-Prod & Prod) tenants in single GRC-IAG bridge setup.

If yes, how GRC system will identify which IAS to check if single GRC-IAG Bridge system is used for access provisioning to both Non-Prod or Production cloud systems as both cloud systems will have different IAS tenants as source for user data.

entry.title: How to configure the CTS+ for Solution Manager 7.2?
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to configure CTS+ on Solution Manager 7.2 system. Could you please let us know the specific documents related to ABAP system connectivity on CTS+?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to configure the CTS+ for Solution Manager 7.2?
entry.content:
Hello,

To configure the CTS+ follow all steps of documentation:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/sm/3518046691.html 

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Hide Crystal report parameter while execute report into SAP Business One
entry.content: Dear Nikunj Mehta, which version of SAP B1 do you currently have? As far as I know, this feature was implemented in one of the latest versions already. But before it was ignored when you set "Do not show option". Kind Regards

entry.title: Re: M-series Apple Chip MacBooks and Abap Platform Trial containers using Docker and Podman
entry.content:
Hi Dylan @dylan-drummond . Thx for your reply and help to investigate.  

So details are the following: 

  • M1 MAX / 64GB RAM -> 48GB assigned to docker, SWAP File is 4GB and vDisk-Limit is 320GB.
  • OS Version is 14.4.1 -> not tested to downgrade until now, maybe during the weekend 
  • Docker Version is 4.29 -> Downgrade to 4.26.1 and 4.25.1 and 4.27.2. Same behaviour. Not Starting
    • My conclusion here is, that I've either an individual problem on my device or the update to 14.4 has changed something regarding rosetta runtime.
    • Also I'm not sure, when I've used the image last time, but if I remember right, with 14.2 it was working   
  • I've cleaned up rosetta, there are some tutorials, where the files are just deleted and then MAC OS requests a fresh install -> basically no changes

Error Messages, I've found in several log files of index server / name server are more or less the same: 

I've also found some discussion about errors of rosetta/sonoma 14.4 and docker in other contexts which support the hypothesis that something has changed with 14.4 and that I do not have an individual problem but not sure about that. Eg.
https://github.com/docker/for-mac/issues/7220
https://forums.developer.apple.com/forums/thread/746618
https://github.com/docker/for-mac/issues/7180
https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=39741115

 

I will try a clean install of docker in the mean while, just to geht sure. 

Thx for you help again, lets see what we've find out together, Tom

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
Hello @Dan_Wroblewski !

My hash: 6a8e6509b7fa2a2419f4a9e1d0a117735304c05997c17d2b736a9e75f1eea116

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas
entry.content:
Part I - 9242eb48a4cbd978f402fb015da41f3f1e4c7cd14e73f755ddce12b89f0e26f1

Part II

Formula for stringtoHash: "$"+FORMAT_LOCALIZED_DECIMAL(SUM_BY_KEY(MAP(data.A_SalesOrderItem1,{"NetAmount": NUMBER(item.NetAmount)}), "NetAmount"),"en",2)

Formula for Chart :

MAP(SELECT(data.A_SalesOrderItem1,index<6),{ x:item.Material, y: NUMBER(item.NetAmount)})

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 not retrieving databases ... dri...
entry.content: Sorry, not got back to this for a while. We have decided to stick to OLE (rather than direct wire). I modified the report to use microsoft OLE Driver (MSOLEDB.1) , which works just fine on 2016; however, this is driver is not installed on standard user machines so cannot use this driver. Have reverted the report back to ole DB Provider (SQLOLEDB) which does work on user machines, but does not work on 2016 server as described in initial problem. The only workaround I think is to not use windows server 2016, but instead use 2019 or 2022.

entry.title: Re: Aggregation on CDS with Virtual Element
entry.content: Were you able to solve this problem somehow? I have a case where a value of a field can be retrieved only using ABAP and I need to use this CDS in KPI. I've checked the solution that suggests associations. The field is displayed in the result CDS but it's empty - class is not called at all.

entry.title: Re: error during install SAP S/4HANA Server 2022
entry.content:
The error message is "cannot allocate enough memory".

A VM with only 32GB of RAM is very small for having SAP HANA and the Application Server on the same host.

If you can't give more RAM to the VM, maybe you can try increase the virtual memory and see if it solves the issue.

entry.title: Duplicate class to different project
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm working on the Core ABAP Skills, and I couldn't find many of the templates and solutions they were talking about in the excercises. That has been solved now, our instructor somehow added them to the environment but they are in a different project. Does anyone know how I can copy the classes from there to my own package in a different project, so that I can make changes to it without changing the original one?

I've tried simply using the duplicate button, but then i can't change the name of the project where it's supposed to go and so I can't get to my own package. 

If you need any more information, please let me know. I can't change the name of the project, and so I can't get to my own package in a different project.

entry.title: exception aggregation used in CDS view and that field is not available in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have used exception aggregation in the CDS consumption view like:

@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #COLUMNS

@EndUserText.label: 'Total Accounts in SAP'

@AnalyticsDetails.exceptionAggregationSteps.exceptionAggregationBehavior: #MAX

@AnalyticsDetails.exceptionAggregationSteps.exceptionAggregationElements: [ 'portion' ,'CompanyCode' ,'UtilitiesDivision']

TotalAcctsSAP,

 

 

 

This field is not available in SAC to be consumed. Not available in the model as well.

 

 Can anyone help me on this..

Thanks,

Subhankar Mondal

entry.title: Which SAP GUI for Windows as of release are adapted for SAP S/4 HANA (2023) ?
entry.content:
Dear SAP

We are using SAP GUI for Windows as of release 7.50 to access ECC 6.0 in PRD.

Now there is a project  of updated to SAP S/4 HANA (2023).

We do not use “Fiori Features”  ,just only Features like ECC.

I want to know two question as below or some guide.

Is SAP GUI for Windows as of release 7.50 is adapted to access   SAP S/4 HANA (2023)?

Which release about SAP GUI for Windows is suggested to access   SAP S/4 HANA (2023)?

entry.title: How to set an Aactive ATC run in ATC result browser in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a question I have recently started using the ATC possibilities in Eclipse I am connected to an S4 System and was wonderrring how this section in Eclipse gets filled 

Is it possible to run an ATC i the TCODE ATC in the GUI and get the results over here?

Thanks you for reading.

entry.title: 1H 2024 Learning - Background Job for Adding Library Items
entry.content: Can you please explain in which case it makes sense to activate this setting?

entry.title: Re: Strategic and Operational Workforce Planning with SAP Best Practices for SAP SuccessFactors and
entry.content:
@RF-SAP 

Hi,

I understand that there is PMGM module in SuccessFactors (performance and goal management).

Do you have idea whether the data / dimensions required for strategic planning (strategic aims, objectives, opportunities, and challenges at the business area and employee level) etc. are available in the PMGM module. 

I intend to acquire the data from SFSF's  PMGM module into SAP Analytics Cloud to implement strategic planning workflow

entry.title: Can your Non Profit Organization Harness the Power of AI?
entry.content:
The world around us is changing at a rapid pace. Powerful trends – amplified and accelerated humanitarian disasters are creating a pressurized environment for many Nonprofit organizations.  Your role has never been more critical than today in addressing social, environmental, and humanitarian issues.  Many of you have limited resources, and your organizations are experiencing employee and donor burnout, and a myriad of other unique issues depending on your operational context.  Donors expect more and trust less; and your organization must do more with less.  Outdated business applications and isolated systems are making it difficult to seize new opportunities and meet changing requirements.  However, new AI capabilities have massive potential - if you're able to harness them. 

Business applications with AI deeply embedded (Business AI) are now able to better automate tasks such as accounting, human resources, reporting, and mission-critical activities. Business AI marks a paradigm shift in how organizations can garner insights from data, automate, and solve issues. In fact, Forrester researchers predict that enterprise AI initiatives will boost productivity and creative problem-solving by 50%, and IDC predicts that by 2026, 90% of G2000 organizations will augment operational roles with automation technology, unlocking a 30% increase in worker efficiency.

AI is already a central, integrated capability of enterprise business applications, and use cases are starting to emerge from Nonprofits who are using Business AI to become more effective.  Here are three examples:   

WEConnect International is a global network that connects women-owned businesses to qualified buyers around the world. The organization needed to be transformed to meet their requirements for user-friendly, secure, and scalable processes. Member buyers using the system needed to be able to search for qualified women-owned businesses quickly using keywords, and often WEConnect international employees were required to manage the searches.  Due to the global nature of the organization, it was also a problem that women-owned businesses could only register using English language, and multiple forms and systems which were not secure were necessary for uploading documents during registration. WEConnect use Intelligent Robotic Process Automation to centralize and simplify the process for women-owned businesses to register, upload documents, and get certified, and to make it easier for buyers to quickly search for a product or service from qualified businesses. 

As a 100% volunteer-driven, nonprofit NGO, Essen für Alle (Food for All, Switzerland) sought an efficient method to optimize its focus on feeding the food insecure. It required a method that helps ensure continuous volunteer coverage across all tasks, while effectively monitoring and managing food donations and distributions. Their volunteer shift planning and schedule management system captures, assesses, and reports volunteer data, empowering administrators to identify gaps and flexibly schedule shifts. Simultaneously, the recipient management system helps facilitate smooth distribution management through AI-enabled document extraction to scan passports, IDs and driver’s licenses and automate the registration process. When integrated together, these systems drive better shift planning and smooth distribution with more-effective tracking and control of food resources. 

Diakone Nord Nord Ost is dedicated to helping people in all life circumstances in more than 100 facilities across Northern Germany. The nonprofit started using Business AI by leveraging a bundle of cloud microservices to automate and simplify the order-to-cash process in accounts receivable with machine learning.  The solution helps reduce manual post-processing of incoming bank statements by applying machine learning to match open receivables to incoming bank statement items or lockbox files, to match supplier invoices to outgoing supplier-initiated payments, and to identify customer accounts for incoming payments.  Introduction of these intelligent capabilities has led to a significant improvement in employee satisfaction by reducing the need for repetitive tasks and enabling employees to focus on higher value activities, resulting in more variation and productivity in their day-to-day work.

These examples provide a glimpse into what is being accomplished today. Here are some additional use cases that Business AI capabilities can provide.     

Nonprofits can utilize Business AI built into finance applications with AI-powered insights, recommendations, and built-in automation.  Business AI leverages advanced algorithms and machine learning to analyze large amounts of data and generate insights into financial, grants, and operational data.  Organizations can use AI to identify patterns in donor behavior leading to more effective fundraising campaigns and increased donor retention. 

In addition, Nonprofits could use business integrity screening to scan large volumes of data in real-time with increased accuracy to detect and prevent fraud and errors. The software helps you identify anomalous activity quickly using flexible rule sets and predictive analysis that can help uncover potential fraud patterns. 

Business AI built into customer service applications can provide tailored solutions to stakeholders, making each interaction an opportunity to improve satisfaction and loyalty. Donors can engage with non-profit organizations using natural language and have simple inquiries resolved at the point of initial contact, without the need of personal interaction. Complex, higher-risk inquiries can be routed to employees who could then focus on providing effective, and personalized services.

The use of natural language (conversational analytics) is making it easier for users to make more refined queries on data.  Users can measure program effectiveness and demonstrate programmatic impact to donors and stakeholders by analyzing large datasets and surfacing the most pertinent insights.   

Virtual assistants embedded into business applications from HR to finance, procurement, marketing, and sales can transform the user experience – it’s like tapping your smartest colleague on the shoulder. Employees can ask a question in natural language and receive intelligent answers drawn from the data across the applications portfolio and third-party sources, retaining context. This not only reduces manual inputs but also ensures time savings, fewer errors, and enhanced efficiency through AI-driven recommendations.

It is always nice to collaborate on the art of the possible.  But where should you consider starting?  I recommend you consider adopting an incremental approach.

  • Start with small projects:  Test the feasibility and benefits of the technology and then scale as you become more comfortable.  Jump-start the use of AI by investing in pre-built solutions to test out narrow use cases.  
  • Collaborate: Include a cross functional team in decisions and roll-out to ensure the use of technology aligns with your mission and benefits the communities you serve.  Engage with other Nonprofit organizations to share knowledge and understand lessons learned. 
  • Safeguard:  Allow for learning and adjustment along the way, minimizing risks. Fully understand the systems limitations and ensure transparency and explainabilty in AI algorithms.  Ensure that the security capabilities provided by vendors ensure appropriate encryption and access controls and that you can adhere to applicable data protection regulations. 

Many Nonprofit organizations need to steer the organization through disruption to achieve the best outcomes which requires both cultural and technological transformation.  While the integration of AI and enterprise business applications capabilities are noteworthy, the real promise of Business AI for Nonprofits isn’t what it can do so much as the value it will create.    Adding capabilities using AI models pretrained on business-relevant data will inherently provide better outcomes. 

I encourage you to go visit the collection of articles on AI in the SAP Insights page or here in the community.     It may provide some good insights for your organizations road ahead.  Happy Reading.

entry.title: Re: Which SAP GUI for Windows as of release are adapted f...
entry.content: 7.50 will work. If you want to use new HTML Control use >= 7.70

entry.title: User password forgotten/reset
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a CUA on Solution Manager 7.2 and we would like to provide the users with a "Password Reset" or "Password Forgotten" facility/link without installing SAP IDM product.

Is it any way to provide that though a link in the SAP WebUI (login screen) or SAPGUI or may be using a BAPI_USER_CHANGE called from a web service ?

Thanks a lot in advance

Max

entry.title: Re: 1H 2024 Learning Improvement - More detail about Impr...
entry.content:
Here are the details:
The suspend data for online content controls how progress on a learning session is stored and retrieved. We've increased the suspend data limit for SCORM 1.2 content to 64,000 characters to provide the additional storage capacity required for content progress to be successfully stored and retrieved.

Some eLearning authoring tools (like Articulate Rise) tend to try to store tons of data in the suspend date field. If they exceeded the previous limit of 4096 characters, the lesson would not save the user's place in the lesson. 

Increasing the limit will allow for longer lessons to be able to store the users' place in the lesson.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/c151e1e747db4708a618236e4dc98512.html?parentHref=%2Fwhats-new%2F8fcf4960eea24f78b1d7613da406a885%3FProduct%3DLearning%26Version%3D1H%25202024%26locale%3Den-US&parentName=SAP%20SuccessFactors%20What%27s%20New

entry.title: Outlook Visit types to C4C
entry.content:
Hello experts,

does someone know if we can add the different Visit/ Appointment Types from C4C to the Outlook categories? So that I can create a Visit in Outlook with the type XY and it appears in C4C with the corresponding visit type.

At the moment, those visits from outlook have the visit type ''not assigned''. So the sales rep have to change the visit type in C4C.

 Thanks!

entry.title: CDS Compiler 4.8.0 rejects function & action return types declared as 'many of many'?!
entry.content:
Hello,

because of a failing deployment for a customer I found out that the latest (v4.8.0) CDS Compiler now rejects function/action return types that are declared as 'many of many'. This is outlined in the changelog.md file, which you can view on npmjs.com. While such a type may not be common in every piece of software, I firmly believe that this is a design choice that has to be made by the developer, not the cds compiler. Why was this change necessary?

Furthermore I find it very worrying that this kind of breaking change is released in a minor patch. Also, why would this change be made just now? Some insight into the thought process towards this would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: New Financial Accounting for Service Management in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Stefan,

Great blog. Thank you.

Will the aggregated type of reporting you describe in chapter 1 of this blog work equally well in the Service with advanced execution implementation? 
What is the integration mechanism between the Service orders and the PM order? Is it based on settlement or can the Service order reporting access the PM order line item detail?

Thank you
Patrick

entry.title: How to monitor SAP Cloud Integration jobs on solman?
entry.content:
Hello Support team,

We want to integrate the SAP Cloud Integration jobs into Solution Manager and we want to know how to do it. Will you have any documentation or SAP NOTE to support us? 

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to monitor SAP Cloud Integration jobs on solman?
entry.content:
Hello,

To monitor cloud products on Solution Manager is necessary a Cloud Connector configuration and after that configure the managed system with cloud connector.

 

Please check the documentation:
Cloud Connector configuration: https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/configuration

0002607632 - SAP Solution Manager 7.2 - Managed System Configuration for SAP Cloud Connector

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

Hi @Rekha_DR ,

Hash :

266d96bc77cf5f432dbcaa655f054d061a0b06346507d8d7a1eab8410a787df6

Home Page: 

Detail Page:

entry.title: Re: WhatsApp Group of Kolkata and Exam
entry.content:
Hi Sandip,

The first round of sorting was done concerning the exams. If you have any specific questions please let us know. We are refraining discussing any other social media in community groups.

entry.title: How can I use a method from Fiori Launchpad in my RAP-based App?
entry.content:
How can I use a method from Fiori Launchpad in my RAP-based App?

I am creating an App to release Billing Block from Sales Orders. so Fiori Launchpad has an App called Manage Sales Order V2 (F3893) it has a removebillingblock method defined in C_SalesOrderManage behavior definition and I want to use it in my RAP-based App.
So what is the optimal way to call this method(action) and use it in my App.

P.s I tried to trace this method with Fiori Launchpad package, It took so long and was so complicated sequence.

-------------------------------------------------------

define behavior for C_SalesOrderManage alias SalesOrder
use etag
extensible
{
use action RemoveBillingBlock; 

}

SAP S/4HANA SD (Sales and Distribution)  ABAP Extensibility  SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: How to delete an ABAP system from Cloud ALM Landscape Management?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support,

 

we want to delete/remove/unregister the ABAP System from the CloudALM.

 

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete an ABAP system from Cloud ALM Landscape...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please remove firstly the endpoints:

  • Check the following links to remove every configuration for all the SAP Cloud ALM scenarios:
    • How to remove Health Monitoring Configuration
    • How to delete components in Business Process Monitoring
    • How to remove configuration in Integration & Exception Monitoring (see Deleting the Monitoring Configuration)
    • How to remove Job Monitoring Configuration (see Configuration of events)
    • For Business Service Management
      • Please remove all the services from any Business Service in BSM tile.
    • For Real User Monitoring
      • Please turn it off in Real User Monitoring tile. This will set it to Not Configured
    • Intelligent Event Processing is removed once all the previous scenarios is removed.

 

Please check the documentation:

0003248215 - How to delete Service/Systems in SAP Cloud ALM

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Which SAP GUI for Windows as of release are adapted f...
entry.content:
Hello @JasonZhong 

The answer by @thomas_mller13 is perfectly correct. On top of that you should look at the note 147519 - Maintenance strategy / deadlines for SAP GUI for Windows / SAP GUI for Java and check SAP GUI support deadlines. SAP GUI 7.50 is not supported since  31st of March 2020, yeah that's 4 years already. 

As you are moving to a brand new system, consider upgrading SAP GUI too. 

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Not uploaded as binary/text type is unknown
entry.content:
Please refer to this answer;

https://ga.support.sap.com/dtp/viewer/index.html#/tree/3046/actions/45995:45996:50742:46000:53797

The unknown file types have to be maintained in .Ui5RepositoryTextFiles or .Ui5RepositoryBinaryFiles files, according to https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/a883327a82ef4cc792f3c1e7b7a48de8

John

entry.title: Re: Replace a Model in the Optimized (Unified) Experience
entry.content:
Hi @Tunir 

We have an acquired Classic Account planning model, which we would like to replace in stories with an otherwise identical acquired New Model with accounts and measures planning model.

The acquired Classic Account planning model was originally created via a BPC 11.X import connection (not a live connection, and not a writeback model). The acquired New Model with accounts and measures planning model will be created from scratch in SAC.

Is this case supported?

I ask because although it is an acquired model, there are limitations elsewhere due to the fact that it happened to be created based on a BPC 11.X import connection originally, e.g. in the use of predictive features. To me I don't see why the source of data should make any difference to an acquired model.

Thanks,

Hugh

entry.title: Re: Activating User Defaults in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks for the blog post, is very informative.

I have a problem when trying to apply this.

I have entered a list of Collection Groups in "Additional Value" but when I go into a Foiori App none of the default values are pre-populated and is ignoring my list of default values.

Is there anything missing?

Thanks

Isabel

entry.title: Re: Create Customer Attributes for Elements of the Process Management in SolMan 7.2
entry.content: @Vivek_Hegde : were you able to manage the multiple attribute selection

entry.title: Re: user created a some materials with reference to other...
entry.content: One workaround would be go to MM01 and against the field "Copy from", place your mouse and use space bar so that, it will list out the latest material codes used.  Of course, multiple material codes would be listed out in MM01 and "Copy from" field is used in all the cases.

entry.title: Free Solution Experience Live Session: Deliver Real-World Results with SAP Business AI
entry.content:
Unveiling SAP Business AI's Potential at the Upcoming Solution Experience Live Session

In an era of continuous innovation and heightened competitiveness, AI's ability to enable smarter decisions and efficiencies on monumental scales has become essential. One such solution that helps businesses to harness the power of AI is SAP Business AI.

The upcoming Solution Experience Live Session: Deliver Real-World Results with SAP Business AI presents a one-of-a-kind opportunity for everyone to grasp the countless benefits and applications of SAP Business AI. Led by Dr. Philipp Herzig, Chief AI Officer at SAP, this one-hour virtual session on Tuesday, April 30, 2024, from 1:30 p.m. to 2:30 p.m. CEST, will expand upon the innovative capabilities of SAP Business AI.

 

The impact of AI on businesses today cannot be overstated. It is integral – not just in streamlining operational processes, but in offering insights and opportunities that were once unthinkable. Increasingly, businesses are making deeper strides into leveraging AI for corporate advantage – with SAP Business AI at the forefront of this change. With AI-skilled experts being the most sought-after professionals in the workforce, the challenge is to close the AI skills gap. SAP has made it it’s mission to make a variety of learning resources on the SAP Learning site available to equip anyone with the right tools to navigate today's AI-driven business environment.

Join us for the virtual session, collectively debunk the mysteries of AI, and tap into the potentials of SAP Business AI. The free-of-charge solution experience live session is open to everyone — mark your calendars and prepare to journey into a AI-empowered future.

Make sure to sign up today.

Want to discover live sessions beyond AI?

With a subscription to SAP Learning Hub, you can unlock further live sessions in other in-demand topics, such as SAP BTP, ABAP Cloud development and how to build apps with SAP Build. You can explore the full live session schedule and join the sessions of your liking with an SAP Learning Hub subscription.

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content: so, it seems to me that the rights "edit object" and "add objects" to the root folder of "Groups and Users" are denied.

entry.title: The Role of SAP Business AI in the Chemical Industry. Overview
entry.content:
Welcome colleagues. Today I’d like to share the description of SAP high level positioning of the Business AI for the Chemicals and Process Industries.

SAP advantage: Business AI Unveiled

At SAP, our commitment to Business AI is underscored by three pillars: relevance, reliability, and responsibility. By embedding these principles into our enterprise applications and business technology solutions, we ensure that our clients receive future-proofed AI experiences tailored to their business context.

Want to know more? Please click here 

AI Impact on the Chemical Industry

To make it short: the advent of AI has revolutionized the Chemical Industry, enhancing efficiency across business processes, manufacturing operations, and decision-making frameworks. Through AI and Machine Learning (ML) algorithms, chemical companies can optimize manufacturing outcomes, refine demand forecasting accuracy, and elevate sales effectiveness - and these are only couple of examples we can provide, there is more below in this blog.

Survey Insights: AI's for Chemical Companies

Collaborating with esteemed industry communities like CEAC (Chemical Executive Advisory Council), ACC (American Chemistry Council) and others, we (SAP IBU Chemicals) have “distilled” the most important scenarios for chemical businesses. We have performed several surveys of AI experts within chemical companies has revealed key areas where AI promises maximum benefits.

From the common AI direction point these priorities are:

  • Help with decision making
  • Process & Routine Tasks Automation
  • Assistance in R&D and Recipe generation
  • Improve the Employee & Customer Experience using natural language

And, we have gathered scenarios prioritization according to respective business domains.

Customer Experience:

  • 360 Customers Review
  • Natural Language Assistance for Sales managers
  • Price Changes Impact Prediction

Procurement:

  • 360 Suppliers Review
  • Supplier Document Data Extraction
  • Contractors job description

Finance & Reporting:

  • Natural Language Assistance in Analytical Reporting
  • Finance Data Insights and Advisory

Supply Chain Management:

  • Demand Forecasting
  • Chemical Technology Process Optimization
  • Visual Inspection for Asset Maintenance & Quality Management

Governance & IT:

  • Master Data Management, Data enrichment and Quality
  • Natural Language User Assistance
  • Business Process Analysis
  • Code Generation and Analysis
  • R&D – Recipe Development Assistance

These scenarios represent the collective vision of industry experts and serve as a roadmap for integrating AI-driven solutions into the fabric of chemical businesses. By aligning our efforts with these prioritized scenarios, SAP aims to empower organizations to unlock new levels of efficiency, agility, and innovation in the ever-evolving landscape of the chemical industry.

How SAP responses on these prioritization?

Responding to industry demands, we have integrated AI across our business applications and developed specialized scenarios to address specific industry needs. Whether it's ML co-pilots for natural language experiences or AI-powered visual inspections for quality management, our solutions are designed to deliver tangible business outcomes.

Our embed AI scenarios a supplied inside our flagship solution SAP S/4HANA Cloud ERP, and Line of Business (LoB) Solutions.

We are also collaborating with our partners with AI-improved applications which are integrated with our cloud solutions.

One of major advantages – since our LoB solutions are integrated with our S/4HANA, so all the all the AI-scenarios we are developing and supplying in LoB are also integrated with our Cloud ERP, and all new capabilities are developed synchronously in all our solutions. All you need to get the latest capabilities and outcomes is to run our cloud solutions.

We are proposing Relevant Scenarios for the Chemical Industry

Building upon customer feedback and industry insights, we have curated a list of AI-powered scenarios tailored for the chemical industry. From customer analysis to demand management and digital assistants, our solutions offer comprehensive support across diverse business domains.

Below is just a couple of examples of AI-powered scenarios we are supplying right now with our and partners’ solutions. Please find couple of examples below which are connected to scenario priorities identified by Chemical communities:

Customer Experience

  • 360 Customer Analysis
  • Mobile Sales assistant
  • AI-powered Price Optimization

Procurement

  • Invoice Conversion
  • Category Recommendation
  • Job description for external contractor workforce

Finance

  • Intelligent Collection
  • Payment Risks Analysis
  • Goods receipt and invoice matching

Supply Chain Management

  • Demand Management
  • Demand-driven replenishment
  • Predictive Shipment Analysis

Manufacturing and Operations

  • Chemical Technology Process non-linear optimization
  • Visual Inspection for Asset and Manufacturing Quality Management
  • Safety Data Sheet Data Extraction

Governance & IT

  • Digital Assistant – Co-pilot for application users
  • Analytics with Natural Language Report Builder
  • Master Data Management
  • Application Custom Code Generation and Analysis

Above is just a list of examples to demonstrate how we are responding on priorities defined by our customers. You can find a lot more information about our AI-powered capabilities in our roadmap. 

Customer Success Stories: Realizing the Potential of AI

Our clients stand as testaments to the transformative power of AI. From optimizing data extraction processes to enhancing production outcomes and improving forecast accuracy, SAP Business AI solutions have catalyzed tangible business growth and operational excellence.

Some of our customers have already realized AI scenarios based on our technologies. Couple of examples are:

  1. Global Chemical company uses Business AI for extraction pertinent data from semi-structured packaging specifications from suppliers and for recording the data into ERP for further processing. It allowed the company to save time and workload
  2. Big Fertilizer Producer is using the ML assistance for technology equipment, which forecasts the optimal process conditions. As a result, the production outcome has been increased on the value from 2 to 10% in tons of production.
  3. Global Petrochemical company uses AI to gather, extract and analyse unstructured external world data to improve forecast accuracy for the commodity prices and demand volumes by regions for their products. They are using these inputs as modifiers for demand process and as a result they have increased their forecast accuracy, sales revenue, and margin
  4. Well known Specialty Chemical company implemented next-generation technologies and artificial intelligence to streamline onboarding for its contact centre representatives and automate the categorization of incoming service tickets, leading to faster onboarding and less time spent on manual tasks

More of examples can be found in our Customer Stories Finder 

AI: How to get there

In conclusion, SAP is at the forefront of driving AI innovation in the chemical industry. With a steadfast commitment to relevance, reliability, and responsibility, we empower businesses to harness the full potential of AI and navigate the complexities of the digital age with confidence.

As a business application vendor, we know well how to integrate AI scenarios into business processes, how to select and score scenarios, how define measure the success, how to define the scenario in detail, how to realize it on our business and technical platform.

If you're interested in learning more about how Business AI can elevate your organization, I invite you to reach out to me and join the conversation. Together, let's build an impressive case powered by SAP Business AI.

  1. SAP Roadmap for Chemicals, with AI  as focus topic of interest
  2. SAP Store - Partner Solutions for Chemical Industry, powered with AI 

Please contact me if you are interested and want more information about positioning of Business AI for the Chemical Industry. Please do nit hesitate give ypur feedbck on it.

Best regards, Sergey Nozhenko, SAP IBU Chemicals

entry.title: material plan price API
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We need to enter plan price to materials as mass upload. We tried to find API but couldn't find. Do you know any API for entering  plan price or standard screen as mass upload ?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: In NWDS when exporting mapping to spreadsheet the constant values are not visible
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am using NWDS mapping Export to spreadsheet and works fine however the constants show up as const() so the actual value is not visible.  What am i doing wrong?
In SapPoConst.jpg you can see part of the export and in SapPoVisual.jpg the actual definition from NWDS mapping visual editor.

Thx Danny.

entry.title: Re: Which SAP GUI for Windows as of release are adapted f...
entry.content: Thanks
